items.title: USD/INR refreshes all-time highs near 93.70 amid consistent FIIs selling
items.summary: The Indian Rupee (INR) extends its downfall against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday after a holiday the previous day.

items.title: WTI Price Forecast: Corrects after failing to return above $100
items.summary: West Texas Intermediate (WTI), futures on NYMEX, trade over 1% lower to near $93.10 during the early European trading session on Friday.
items.title_ko: WTI 가격 예측: $ 100를 초과하여 반환하지 못한 후 수정
items.summary_ko: 서부 텍사스 중급 (WTI), NYMEX의 선물, 금요일의 초기 유럽 거래 세션에서 1% 이상 낮은 $ 93.10 에 가까운 거래.
